description_long: This is a modern, square-shaped sink with a wide, flat rim and a deep, rectangular basin. The sink features a single, angular faucet mounted on one corner of the rim, with a spout extending over the basin. The basin itself is recessed below the rim and appears to be made of a dark material, contrasting with the lighter, metallic-looking rim and faucet. The underside of the basin is visible and has a rounded, bowl-like form, suggesting a sturdy construction. The overall design is minimalist and functional, suitable for urban environments such as public restrooms, parks, or outdoor facilities. The sink does not display any visible overflow hole, and the drain appears to be centrally located within the basin.
description: A modern, square sink with a deep, dark basin and a single angular faucet on one corner. The design is minimalist with a contrasting light rim and a central drain.
description_view_0: Front view showing the wide rim, deep basin, and faucet centered at the back.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the angular faucet on the left and the depth of the basin.
description_view_2: Rear view with the faucet in the foreground and the rounded underside of the basin visible.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with the faucet on the right and the square rim clearly outlined.
